description.value:
Wetland craft notes for shock-absorption — Myrmål armor-weavers stuff their padding with treated marsh reeds known to spring back under pressure; the technique adapts naturally to shedding mud from boots and greaves.

Effect: You ignore difficult terrain caused by mud and shallow bogs.

Rules: Difficult Terrain.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least quality craft; dried marsh reeds gathered from Myrland bogs
